chapter_title.ar: باب مَا يَجِبُ عَلَى الطَّرَّارِ وَ الْمُخْتَلِسِ مِنَ الْحَدِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 37 – What Penalty (Hadd) is Obligated upon the villain and the embezzler

text: أُتِيَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) بِطَرَّارٍ قَدْ طَرَّ دَرَاهِمَ مِنْ كُمِّ رَجُلٍ قَالَ فَقَالَ إِنْ كَانَ قَدْ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الْأَعْلَى لَمْ أَقْطَعْهُ وَ إِنْ كَانَ طَرَّ مِنْ قَمِيصِهِ الدَّاخِلِ قَطَعْتُهُ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Ibrahim, form his father, from Al Nowfaly, from Al Sakuny,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘They came with a pick-pocket who had picked some Dirhams from a man. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘If he has picked it from his outer shirt, I<sup>asws</sup> would not cut his (hand), but if he picked is from his inner shirt, I<sup>asws</sup> would cut his (hand)’.
